# WORKFLOW_NAME

One-line description of what this workflow does.

## Features

- List key features and capabilities
- Highlight important aspects
- Mention any special requirements or considerations

## Inputs

| Name           | Type   | Required | Default       | Description                    |
|----------------|--------|----------|---------------|--------------------------------|
| required_input | string | Yes      | —            | Description of required input  |
| optional_input | string | No       | default-value | Description of optional input  |

## Outputs

| Name        | Description              |
|-------------|-------------------------|
| output_name | Description of output   |

## Example Usage

```yaml
jobs:
  example_job:
    uses: your-org/github-actions/.github/workflows/workflow-name.yml@v1.0.0
    with:
      required_input: 'value'
      optional_input: 'custom-value'
```
